title: OBJ/FBX Loader
description: This mod adds the ability to use OBJ and FBX 3d model files to replace existing models. They can be animated too. Example resource packs are listed below for reference on how to create your own. Blender export options will be shown in these resource packs
body:
This mod allows you to turn any item, block, or mob into an OBJ or FBX, and animated. Example resource packs on how to do this are listed below

(OBJ) https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/obj-example-for-obj-fbx-loader



(FBX) https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fbx-example-for-obj-fbx-loader

Server plugin: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/obj-fbx-loader-server


Controls:

O - open item and entity configuration menu.

Full documentation here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1uv9mgo5lIExZq2T5kmK2Llc2H1xdw5z4812D__kYL_A/edit?tab=t.0



Model Credits: 

Wigi: https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/luigi-textured-3ds-e73a8cebd2fa4bbc9f986b6e0956899a

Dinosaur: https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/t-rex-15d380651e0b4cc394ffa308d30e625e
